```{r Model performance 1, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE}
           municipality_type = dataset$municipality_type,
           Model = model_name)
    
  })
  
  bind_rows(residual_list)
}

residual_df <- get_residuals(models, dataset_sales_cv)
saveRDS(residual_df, "saved_files_lot_sales//residual_df_combined.rds")

performance_countrywide <- residual_df %>%
                           mutate(dataset_type = if_else(validation, "Validation", "Training")) %>%
                           group_by(dataset_type, type) %>%
                           summarise(municipality_type = "Countrywide",
                                     MALE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_log)),
                                     MAPE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_percent)),
                                     MAE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price)),
                                     PM20 = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_percent) <= 20) * 100,
                                     COD = mean(abs(ratio - median(ratio))) / median(ratio) * 100,
                                     PRD = mean(ratio) / (sum(predicted_sales_price) / sum(sales_price)),
                                     .groups = "drop")

performance_municipality_type <- residual_df %>%
                                 mutate(dataset_type = if_else(validation, "Validation", "Training")) %>%
                                 group_by(dataset_type, municipality_type) %>%
                                 summarise(MALE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_log)),
                                           MAPE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_percent)),
                                           MAE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price)),
                                           PM20 = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_percent) <= 20) * 100,
                                           COD = mean(abs(ratio - median(ratio))) / median(ratio) * 100,
                                           .groups = "drop")

performance <- bind_rows(performance_countrywide, performance_municipality_type)

municipality_levels <- c("Countrywide", sort(setdiff(unique(performance$municipality_type), "Countrywide")))

performance_sorted <- performance %>%
                      mutate(dataset_type = factor(dataset_type, levels = c("Training", "Validation")),
                             municipality_type = factor(municipality_type, levels = municipality_levels),
                             MAE = round(MAE,0),
                             PRD = ifelse(is.na(PRD), "", round(PRD, 2))) %>%
                      arrange(municipality_type, dataset_type)  %>% 
                      rename(Type = dataset_type,
                             `Municipality type` = municipality_type,
                             `MAPE [%]` = MAPE,
                             `MAE [DKK]` = MAE,
                             `PM20 [%]` = PM20,
                             `COD [%]` = COD)

#standard table
#knitr::kable(performance_sorted, digits = 2, caption = "Model Performance by Municipality Type")

#nicer table
kable(performance_sorted %>% 
select(-`Municipality type`), 
       digits = 2, 
       caption = "Model Performance by Municipality Type", 
       booktabs = TRUE) %>%
kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
group_rows("Countrywide", 1, 2) %>%
group_rows("Capital", 3, 4) %>%
group_rows("Commuter", 5, 6) %>%
group_rows("Large city", 7, 8) %>%
group_rows("Provincial", 9, 10) %>%
group_rows("Rural", 11, 12)

tbl_latex <- kable(performance_sorted %>% select(-`Municipality type`),
                   format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, digits = 2,
                   caption = "Model performance by municipality type.",
                   label = "perf_by_muni") %>%
             kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, 
                           position = "center", 
                           latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
             group_rows("Countrywide", 1, 2) %>%
             group_rows("Capital", 3, 4) %>%
             group_rows("Commuter", 5, 6) %>%
             group_rows("Large city", 7, 8) %>%
             group_rows("Provincial", 9, 10) %>%
             group_rows("Rural", 11, 12)


```




#### 12. Combined property and lot model augmented 

```{r Combined model augmented, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, results = 'hide', fig.width=20, fig.height=30}
standard_building_value <- 1e+6


#Create combined sales set with standardized properties on lot sales

standardize_property <- function(data, reference_data) {
  
    data %>% mutate(year_built = 1970,
                    year_rebuilt = 1970,
                    living_space = 140,
                    maximum_coverage_percentage = 30,
                    unused_floor_area = 0,
                    number_of_divisions = 1,
                    number_of_bathrooms = 1,
                    house_type = factor("Detached", levels = levels(factor(reference_data$house_type))),
                    roof_type = factor("Fiber cement", levels = levels(factor(reference_data$roof_type))),
                    wall_type = factor("Brick", levels = levels(factor(reference_data$wall_type))),
                    heating_type = factor("District heating", levels = levels(factor(reference_data$heating_type))))
  }

dataset_lot_sales <- standardize_property(dataset_lot_sales, dataset)

standard_building_value <- 1e6

dataset_lot_sales <- dataset_lot_sales %>%
                     mutate(sales_price_observed = sales_price,
                            standard_building_value_added = standard_building_value,
                            sales_price = sales_price + standard_building_value_added)

dataset_property_sales <- dataset_property_sales %>%
                          mutate(sales_price_observed = sales_price,
                                 standard_building_value_added = 0)

dataset_sales <- bind_rows(dataset_property_sales, dataset_lot_sales)
dataset_sales$type <- factor(dataset_sales$type, levels = c("Property sale", "Lot sale"))

#assign folds
assign_cv_folds <- function(data, N, seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)
  data %>% mutate(validation_set = sample(rep(1:N, length.out = n())),
                  .rand = runif(n()))
}

dataset_sales_cv <- assign_cv_folds(dataset_sales, N = N, seed = 123)

table(dataset_sales_cv$validation_set, useNA = "ifany")


#fit models
fit_fold <- function(i, data, k_spatial, k_other = 10, fraction = 1.0,
                     checkpoint_prefix = "Model", save_checkpoint = TRUE,
                     seed = 123) {
  
  training_subset <- data %>% filter(validation_set != i)

  if (fraction < 1.0) {
    
    training_subset <- training_subset %>%
                       group_by(municipality_type) %>%
                       arrange(.rand, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
                       slice_head(prop = fraction) %>%
                       ungroup() 
  }
  
  model <- bam(sales_price ~ 
               s(coordinate_east, coordinate_north, k = k_spatial, pc = c(697000, 6150000)) +
               s(sales_date_numeric, k = k_other, by = municipality_type, pc = 2024) +
               s(year_built, k = k_other, by = municipality_type, pc = 1970) +
               s(year_rebuilt, k = k_other, by = municipality_type, pc = 1970) +
               s(living_space, k = k_other, by = municipality_type, pc = 140) +
               s(lot_size, k = k_other, by = municipality_type, pc = 800) +
               s(coast_distance, k = k_other, pc = 1500) +
               s(lake_distance, k = k_other, pc = 500) +
               s(stream_distance, k = k_other, pc = 1000) +
               s(road_distance, k = k_other, pc = 2000) +
               s(highway_distance, k = k_other, pc = 2000) +
               s(train_station_distance, k = k_other, pc = 2000) +
               s(railway_distance, k = k_other, pc = 1000) +
               s(windturbine_distance, k = k_other, pc = 3000) +
               s(ocean_view, k = k_other, pc = 0) +
               s(lake_view, k = k_other, pc = 0) +
               s(forest_size, k = k_other, pc = 0) +
               s(number_of_bathrooms, by = type, k = 2, pc = 1) +
               house_type * municipality_type +
               roof_type * municipality_type +
               wall_type * municipality_type +
               heating_type * municipality_type +
               type * municipality_type,
               data = training_subset,
               chunk.size = nrow(training_subset),
               family = tw(link = log),
               method = "fREML")
  
  if (save_checkpoint) {
    filename <- sprintf("%s_fold%d_k%d_frac%.2f.rds", checkpoint_prefix, i, k_spatial, fraction)
    saveRDS(model, file = file.path("checkpoints_lot_sales", filename))
  }
  
  model
}

fit_model_ensemble <- function(data, N, k_spatial, k_other = 10, fraction = 1.0, checkpoint_prefix = "Model") {
  
  models <- future_lapply(1:N, function(i) {
    fit_fold(
      i = i,
      data = data,
      k_spatial = k_spatial,
      k_other = k_other,
      fraction = fraction,
      checkpoint_prefix = checkpoint_prefix
    )
  })
  names(models) <- paste0("Model", 1:N)
  models
}

if (load) {
  models <- readRDS("saved_files_lot_sales/models_combined_augmented.rds")
} else {
  models <- fit_model_ensemble(
    data = dataset_sales_cv,
    N = N,
    k_spatial = k_spatial,
    k_other = k_other,
    fraction = 1.0,
    checkpoint_prefix = "main"
  )
  saveRDS(models, "saved_files_lot_sales/models_combined_augmented.rds")
}

```



```{r Model performance 2, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE}

get_residuals <- function(models, dataset, fold_from_name = TRUE) {
  
  residual_list <- future_lapply(seq_along(models), function(i) {
    
    model_name <- names(models)[i]
    model <- models[[i]]
    
    fold <- if (fold_from_name) {
      as.integer(sub("^Model(\\d+).*$", "\\1", model_name))
    } else {
      i
    }
    
    predicted_model_price <- as.vector(
      predict.gam(model, newdata = dataset, type = "response")
    )
    
    predicted_observed_price <- predicted_model_price - dataset$standard_building_value_added
    
    observed_price <- dataset$sales_price_observed
    
    tibble(sales_price = observed_price,
           sales_price_model = dataset$sales_price,
           predicted_sales_price = predicted_observed_price,
           predicted_model_price = predicted_model_price,
           residual_sales_price = predicted_observed_price - observed_price,
           residual_sales_price_percent = (predicted_observed_price - observed_price) / observed_price * 100,
           residual_sales_price_log = log(predicted_observed_price) - log(observed_price),
           ratio = predicted_observed_price / observed_price,
           validation = dataset$validation_set == fold,
           id = dataset$id,
           type = dataset$type,
           municipality_type = dataset$municipality_type,
           Model = model_name)
  })
  
  bind_rows(residual_list)
}

residual_df <- get_residuals(models, dataset_sales_cv)
saveRDS(residual_df, "saved_files_lot_sales//residual_df_combined_augmented.rds")

performance_countrywide <- residual_df %>%
                           mutate(dataset_type = if_else(validation, "Validation", "Training")) %>%
                           group_by(dataset_type, type) %>%
                           summarise(municipality_type = "Countrywide",
                                     MALE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_log)),
                                     MAPE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_percent)),
                                     MAE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price)),
                                     PM20 = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_percent) <= 20) * 100,
                                     COD = mean(abs(ratio - median(ratio))) / median(ratio) * 100,
                                     PRD = mean(ratio) / (sum(predicted_sales_price) / sum(sales_price)),
                                     .groups = "drop")

performance_municipality_type <- residual_df %>%
                                 mutate(dataset_type = if_else(validation, "Validation", "Training")) %>%
                                 group_by(dataset_type, municipality_type) %>%
                                 summarise(MALE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_log)),
                                           MAPE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_percent)),
                                           MAE = mean(abs(residual_sales_price)),
                                           PM20 = mean(abs(residual_sales_price_percent) <= 20) * 100,
                                           COD = mean(abs(ratio - median(ratio))) / median(ratio) * 100,
                                           .groups = "drop")

performance <- bind_rows(performance_countrywide, performance_municipality_type)

municipality_levels <- c("Countrywide", sort(setdiff(unique(performance$municipality_type), "Countrywide")))

performance_sorted <- performance %>%
                      mutate(dataset_type = factor(dataset_type, levels = c("Training", "Validation")),
                             municipality_type = factor(municipality_type, levels = municipality_levels),
                             MAE = round(MAE,0),
                             PRD = ifelse(is.na(PRD), "", round(PRD, 2))) %>%
                      arrange(municipality_type, dataset_type)  %>% 
                      rename(Type = dataset_type,
                             `Municipality type` = municipality_type,
                             `MAPE [%]` = MAPE,
                             `MAE [DKK]` = MAE,
                             `PM20 [%]` = PM20,
                             `COD [%]` = COD)

#standard table
#knitr::kable(performance_sorted, digits = 2, caption = "Model Performance by Municipality Type")

#nicer table
kable(performance_sorted %>% 
select(-`Municipality type`), 
       digits = 2, 
       caption = "Model Performance by Municipality Type", 
       booktabs = TRUE) %>%
kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
group_rows("Countrywide", 1, 2) %>%
group_rows("Capital", 3, 4) %>%
group_rows("Commuter", 5, 6) %>%
group_rows("Large city", 7, 8) %>%
group_rows("Provincial", 9, 10) %>%
group_rows("Rural", 11, 12)

tbl_latex <- kable(performance_sorted %>% select(-`Municipality type`),
                   format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, digits = 2,
                   caption = "Model performance by municipality type.",
                   label = "perf_by_muni") %>%
             kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, 
                           position = "center", 
                           latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
             group_rows("Countrywide", 1, 2) %>%
             group_rows("Capital", 3, 4) %>%
             group_rows("Commuter", 5, 6) %>%
             group_rows("Large city", 7, 8) %>%
             group_rows("Provincial", 9, 10) %>%
             group_rows("Rural", 11, 12)


```
